falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5,500 (2024 August resistance level) with a close above this level on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bullish breakout pattern, directly contradicting the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal by showing clear upward momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX spikes above 30 and remains above this level for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate market panic or blowoff conditions, contradicting the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a different macro phase than the pattern-matched bottom scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This unprecedented intervention would invalidate the current pattern analysis by introducing a major exogenous shock that completely changes the macroeconomic framework

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
